title: Kast Fulier
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Kast}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image= |name=Kast Fulier |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]]''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=he/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters= |apprentices=[[Etain Tur-Mukan]] }} {{Quote|Master Fulier has, or had, some discipline issues.''"
"''Master Fulier was—is a courageous Jedi. He is simply passionate about justice.|Valaqil and Bardan Jusik|}} '''Kast Fulier''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in the decades leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Along with his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Etain Tur-Mukan]], Fulier was assigned to the planet [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]] to investigate oppression by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. While Tur-Mukan went on to complete the mission, Master Fulier did not survive his time on the planet. ==Biography== {{Quote|Master Fulier was unfortunate. And betrayed.|Etain Tur-Mukan about Kast Fulier|}} Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] at an early age, Kast Fulier was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], eventually being selected by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] to study as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. After years of study and constructing a blue [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], Fulier passed his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and was [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|made]] a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. Serving the Order for many years and building a reputation as being loose with rules, like to that of Master [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], Fulier eventually took on [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] as his own pupil, after having achieved the title of Master himself. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the High Council was made aware of a growing presence of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] on the world of [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]] and suspected that they may be aiding in the growth of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. [[Mission to Qiilura|Dispatching]] Fulier and Padawan Tur-Mukan to investigate, the Council was particularly interested in the involvement of the notorious scientist [[Ovolot Qail Uthan]] and the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]], [[Ghez Hokan]]. Undercover on the agricultural-reliant planet, the Jedi began attempts to infiltrate small farming communities, but they only met in failure as the farmers were aligned with Hokan thanks to his pay-offs. Eventually, the Jedi were turned over to the Mandalorian, but not before Tur-Mukan could escape into the country side. Brought to the Trade Federation stronghold for interrogation, Hokan killed Fulier with his own lightsaber after the Knight refused to talk. ==Legacy== Survived by his Padawan, reinforcements eventually came to her aid on Qiilura in the form of [[Clone commando/Legends|Republic commandos]]. Raiding the Trade Federation facility, the commandos killed Hokan and arrested the scientist he protected. Commando [[Fi Skirata|RC-8015]] retrieved Fulier's lightsaber from Hokan's corpse and passed it along to Padawan Tur-Mukan at the end of the Qiilura incident. While Tur-Mukan died in the initial stages of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]], Fulier's lightsaber was recovered by her loyal commandos and passed along to her secret son, [[Venku Skirata]].''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|I see that Master Fulier taught you little about obedience but a great deal about sentimentality.|Arligan Zey to Etain Tur-Mukan|}} Those that knew Fulier noted that he never backed down from a challenge. While on Qiilura, Fulier used his and his Padawan's entire supply of [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] spray to help the villagers instead of keeping any for their own use. He was captured while trying to teach one of Hokan's thugs a lesson about abusing the townsfolk. Fulier refused to let a difficult or impossible situation stop him from doing what he felt was right, no matter the consequences. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Kast Fulier |pl=Kast Fulier }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Fulier, Kast}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Masters]]
